sections.title: Project Overview
sections.description: Comprehensive guide for maintaining mobile-friendly code in NiftdoodWorld game

sections.title: Performance Optimization
content: 1. Use sprite sheets for animations to reduce HTTP requests
2. Implement object pooling for frequently created/destroyed objects
3. Optimize asset loading with progressive loading techniques
4. Use appropriate texture compression formats (PVRTC for iOS, ETC for Android)
5. Implement level of detail (LOD) systems for complex scenes

sections.title: UI/UX Guidelines
content: 1. Design for multiple screen sizes using responsive layouts
2. Implement touch-friendly controls with appropriate sizing
3. Use clear visual feedback for all interactive elements
4. Optimize text rendering for readability on small screens
5. Test UI elements on various device orientations

sections.title: Input Handling
content: 1. Support both touch and keyboard/gamepad input methods
2. Implement gesture recognition for common actions
3. Provide customizable control schemes
4. Handle touch events efficiently to prevent performance issues
5. Implement proper focus management for accessibility

sections.title: Testing Procedures
content: 1. Test on actual devices, not just emulators
2. Verify performance across different hardware capabilities
3. Check compatibility with various OS versions
4. Validate touch interactions and gesture recognition
5. Test network connectivity scenarios and error handling
